raw_input.title: Backend Engineer (Python)
raw_input.job_html_or_text: Backend Engineer Python for Datavant healthcare data collaboration platform. Life Sciences Tech Hub in Barcelona, hybrid setting, Python backend, AWS/Kubernetes, and seniority around 6+ years.

profile.base_cv_text: Backend Python/Django/FastAPI/PostgreSQL engineer with 4+ years, Malaga, open to remote/hybrid Spain/EU. Hybrid outside Malaga and 6+ years should be reviewed.

human_review_notes: Reviewed real case: good technical stack, but hybrid/Barcelona and seniority gap should keep it out of automatic APPLY_NOW.
